arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'weighing up £33m January bid' for Premier League centre-back
arts.sum: Manchester United could reportedly make a £33m bid for Crystal Palace's Marc Guehi during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Difficult and unpopular decisions needed at Man Utd - Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe says the club has become "mediocre" and warned more "difficult and unpopular decisions" will be needed to get it back where he wants it to be.

arts.ttl: Manchester United already have a secret weapon to solve weakness Arsenal exploited
arts.sum: Man United will be looking to return to winning ways when they host Nottingham Forest at Old Trafford on Saturday evening (5.30pm) following Wednesday night's defeat vs Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Nottingham Forest LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Red Devils out to respond after Ruben Amorim’s first defeat

arts.ttl: Dramatic collapse costs Manchester United academy stars in European blow
arts.sum: Man United's Under-21s were undone by three quick-fire goals at Carrington on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Ex-Roma CEO tipped for new role in Premier League with Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Former Roma CEO Lina Souloukou is reportedly set to join Premier League side Nottingham Forest...

arts.ttl: Manchester United squad vs Nottingham Forest confirmed as summer signing could make full debut
arts.sum: Man United centre-back Leny Yoro was among the early arrivals at Old Trafford ahead of the Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest on Saturday teatime.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest LIVE early team news and how to watch Premier League clash
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Live updates from Man United's Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest at Old Trafford on Saturday teatime.

arts.ttl: Growing belief Manchester United ‘could be the ones’ to pay €75m clause – Club ready to deal and invest money
arts.sum: Manchester United ‘could be the ones’ to pay Victor Osimhen’s €75m release clause in the January transfer window, with Napoli ready to do business. That’s according to Il Mattino, via Napoli Magazine, who say Manchester United are very much in the mix for the Nigerian striker. arts.ttl: Man Utd invite USMNT wonderkid for trial
arts.sum: Berchimas to trial at Man Utd The forward regularly features for the club's MLS Next Pro side Crown Legacy FC as well as the United States U20 national team.
